incident_report:
# Incident Report: Dungeon Agent Run (Seed 10)

**Summary:** Both Agent A and Agent B failed to complete the dungeon objective within the 50-turn limit, reaching turn 51 with zero progress toward the goal. The run was severely hampered by repeated spurious_block anomalies that blocked agent movement throughout the session, with 9 total anomalies occurring at turns 7, 14, 15, 19, 22, 28, 38, 40, and 45.

**Root Cause:** Agent B encountered the majority of blocking anomalies (6 out of 9), particularly in the early-to-mid game phase (turns 7-28), which appears to have disrupted its primary pathfinding strategy. Neither agent successfully acquired the key pickup or unlocked any doors, suggesting the anomalies prevented forward progress toward critical objectives. No messages were sent between agents and no dungeon master interactions occurred, indicating the agents may have been unable to coordinate or request assistance.

**Critical Decision Points:** The most notable failure occurred between turns 7-22, when Agent B encountered 5 spurious_block anomalies in rapid succession, potentially forcing suboptimal route recalculations. Agent A's later anomalies at turns 38 and 40 suggest the agents were still attempting movement despite the pattern of blockages, without apparent
